commands.cmd: read-only repair, recipe foundation, ingredient, serving, conversion, intake and Pantry ownership audit

summary: Approved the nutrient-specific quality and profile-local timezone repair. Scoped a read-only Scout to map the exact recipe calculation and explicit-intake boundary before implementation.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Map stable recipe, product-record, unit, serving, immutable-calculation and explicit-intake seams without touching Pantry T015-owned files.
